title: The Volcano Calls the Giants
description: On pages 17–19, the volcano calls the giants as luffy and the crew meet Dorry and Brogy, two giant warriors locked in a century-long duel on Little Garden.
scene: The Volcano Calls the Giants. Luffy and the crew meet Dorry and Brogy, two giant warriors locked in a century-long duel on Little Garden. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It can't be...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Pursuers!? Already!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: He was a fine man!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Nami! How's the log!?

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: I-it finished recording!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Then let's hurry up and get going!

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Viv!!

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: We have to hurry up! If they find us now, IGARAM's sacrifice would have been in vain!

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: This girl is strong...!

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: It's alright!

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: I promise we'll safely get you back to Alabasta!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Luffy! Go wake those two up and bring them back to the ship!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I'll be going ahead to the ship first!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Those 4 managed to save all of East Blue all by themselves...!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Alright, just leave it to me!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Even a Shichibukai won't stand a chance against them!

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: We are also looking for a

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hmmm?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hmmmm.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Those are goggles. "sniper goggles." At first he only wore them for looks, but in logletown he got the brand new model from north blue. The scene on the right was supposed to be the first page of chapter 98 in volume 11, but the number of pages went over the limit, so

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Damn!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You got an eye for the good stuff. That's the newest model from North Blue,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I also want this watch,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I like these GOGgles!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: And this magnet!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Oh, don't you have any raw eggs?!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It came with the Marines when their annual report ship came by.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Go to the market for that!

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on the volcano calls the giants. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
